{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2007
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2007
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 14 - June 6
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
|runner-up       = [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]
|matches         = 115
|goals           = 327
|top goal scorer = 
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2006 Copa do Brasil|2006]]
|nextseason      = [[2008 Copa do Brasil|2008]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2007''' is the 19th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. 

The competition started on February 14, 2007 and concluded on June 6, 2007 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Orlando Scarpelli]] in [[Florianópolis]], in which [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 1-0 victory over [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense]].

==Knockout round==
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01 = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras-SP]]
| RD1-team02 = [[Operário (VG)|Operário (VG)-MT]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 5
| RD1-score02-1 = 0
| RD1-score01-2 =
| RD1-score02-2 =
| RD1-team03 = [[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga-MG]]
| RD1-team04 = [[Vitória Futebol Clube (ES)|Vitória-ES]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 3
| RD1-score04-2 = 1
| RD1-team05 = [[Sport Club Recife|Sport-PE]]
| RD1-team06 = [[Campinense Clube|Campinense-PB]]
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 3
| RD1-score06-2 = 0
| RD1-team07 = [[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (AM)|São Raimundo-AM]]
| RD1-team08 = [[Clube Municipal Ananindeua|Ananindeua-PA]]
| RD1-score07-1 = 0
| RD1-score08-1 = 2
| RD1-score07-2 = 1
| RD1-score08-2 = 0
| RD1-team09 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro-MG]]
| RD1-team10 = [[Veranópolis Esporte Clube Recreativo e Cultural|Veranópolis-RS]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 0
| RD1-score10-1 = 0
| RD1-score09-2 = 1
| RD1-score10-2 = 0
| RD1-team11 = [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa-SP]]
| RD1-team12 = [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Chapadão|Chapadão-MS]]
| RD1-score11-1 = 2
| RD1-score12-1 = 0
| RD1-score11-2 =
| RD1-score12-2 =
| RD1-team13 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude-RS]] ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-team14 = [[Associação Ferroviária de Esportes|Ferroviária-SP]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 1
| RD1-score14-1 = 3
| RD1-score13-2 = 2
| RD1-score14-2 = 0
| RD1-team15 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]
| RD1-team16 = [[Barra do Garças Futebol Clube|Barra do Garças-MT]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 4
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 =
| RD1-score16-2 =
| RD2-team01 = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras-SP]]
| RD2-team02 = [[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga-MG]] ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD2-score01-1 = 0
| RD2-score02-1 = 2
| RD2-score01-2 = 2 (3)
| RD2-score02-2 = 0 (4)
| RD2-team03 = [[Sport Club Recife|Sport-PE]]
| RD2-team04 = [[Clube Municipal Ananindeua|Ananindeua-PA]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 5
| RD2-score04-1 = 0
| RD2-score03-2 =
| RD2-score04-2 =
| RD2-team05 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro-MG]]
| RD2-team06 = [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa-SP]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 0
| RD2-score06-1 = 0
| RD2-score05-2 = 2
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-team07 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude-RS]]
| RD2-team08 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]
| RD2-score07-1 = 0
| RD2-score08-1 = 0
| RD2-score07-2 = 2
| RD2-score08-2 = 3
| RD3-team01 = [[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga-MG]] ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD3-team02 = [[Sport Club Recife|Sport-PE]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 1 
| RD3-score01-2 = 1 (4)
| RD3-score02-2 = 1 (2)
| RD3-team03 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro-MG]]
| RD3-team04 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 0
| RD3-score04-1 = 1
| RD3-score03-2 = 1
| RD3-score04-2 = 1
| RD4-team01 = [[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga-MG]]
| RD4-team02 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]
| RD4-score01 = 
| RD4-score02 = 
}}

{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético-PR]]
| RD1-team02 = [[Coxim Atlético Clube|Coxim-MS]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 5
| RD1-score02-1 = 2
| RD1-score01-2 =
| RD1-score02-2 =
| RD1-team03 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória-BA]]
| RD1-team04 = [[Associação Cultural Esporte Clube Baraúnas|Baraúnas-RN]]*
| RD1-score03-1 = 1
| RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 1 (3)
| RD1-score04-2 = 1 (5)
| RD1-team05 = [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani-SP]]
| RD1-team06 = [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]]
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 2
| RD1-score05-2 = 0
| RD1-score06-2 = 0
| RD1-team07 = [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza-CE]]
| RD1-team08 = [[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa-MA]]
| RD1-score07-1 = 3
| RD1-score08-1 = 1
| RD1-score07-2 =
| RD1-score08-2 =
| RD1-team09 = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]]
| RD1-team10 = [[Associação Desportiva Senador Guiomard|ADESG-AC]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 2
| RD1-score10-1 = 1
| RD1-score09-2 = 6
| RD1-score10-2 = 0
| RD1-team11 = [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América-RN]]
| RD1-team12 = [[Baré Esporte Clube|Baré-RR]]
| RD1-score11-1 = 0
| RD1-score12-1 = 1
| RD1-score11-2 = 2
| RD1-score12-2 = 0
| RD1-team13 = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás-GO]]
| RD1-team14 = [[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club-MA]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 3
| RD1-score14-1 = 1
| RD1-score13-2 =
| RD1-score14-2 =
| RD1-team15 = [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]-BA ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-team16 = [[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana-SE]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 2
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 = 0
| RD1-score16-2 = 1
| RD2-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético-PR]] ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-team02 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória-BA]]
| RD2-score01-1 = 1
| RD2-score02-1 = 4
| RD2-score01-2 = 3
| RD2-score02-2 = 0
| RD2-team03 = [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]] ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD2-team04 = [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza-CE]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 2
| RD2-score04-1 = 3
| RD2-score03-2 = 3 (5)
| RD2-score04-2 = 2 (3)
| RD2-team05 = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]] ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-team06 = [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América-RN]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 2
| RD2-score06-1 = 1
| RD2-score05-2 = 0
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-team07 = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás-GO]]
| RD2-team08 = [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]-BA ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score07-1 = 1
| RD2-score08-1 = 1
| RD2-score07-2 = 3
| RD2-score08-2 = 3
| RD3-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético-PR]] ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD3-team02 = [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 3 
| RD3-score01-2 = 2
| RD3-score02-2 = 0
| RD3-team03 = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]] ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD3-team04 = [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]-BA
| RD3-score03-1 = 1
| RD3-score04-1 = 1
| RD3-score03-2 = 2
| RD3-score04-2 = 2
| RD4-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético-PR]]
| RD4-team02 = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]]
| RD4-score01 = 
| RD4-score02 = 
}}

{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]
| RD1-team02 = [[Olímpico Pirambu Futebol Clube|Pirambu-SE]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 1
| RD1-score02-1 = 1
| RD1-score01-2 = 3
| RD1-score02-2 = 0
| RD1-team03 = [[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze-PB]]
| RD1-team04 = [[Vilavelhense Futebol Clube|Vilavelhense-ES]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 3
| RD1-score04-2 = 1
| RD1-team05 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]
| RD1-team06 = [[Parnahyba Esporte Clube|Parnahyba-PI]]
| RD1-score05-1 = 2
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 6
| RD1-score06-2 = 0
| RD1-team07 = [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu-PA]]
| RD1-team08 = [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José-AP]]
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 0
| RD1-score07-2 = 2
| RD1-score08-2 = 2
| RD1-team09 = [[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]
| RD1-team10 = [[Nacional Fast Clube|Fast Clube-AM]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 2
| RD1-score10-1 = 1
| RD1-score09-2 = 6
| RD1-score10-2 = 0
| RD1-team11 = [[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama-DF]]
| RD1-team12 = [[Araguaína Futebol e Regatas|Araguaína-TO]]
| RD1-score11-1 = 3
| RD1-score12-1 = 1
| RD1-score11-2 =
| RD1-score12-2 =
| RD1-team13 = [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense-SC]]
| RD1-team14 = [[Madureira Esporte Clube|Madureira-RJ]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 3
| RD1-score14-1 = 2
| RD1-score13-2 = 2
| RD1-score14-2 = 0
| RD1-team15 = [[Esporte Clube Noroeste|Noroeste-SP]]
| RD1-team16 = [[Adap Galo Maringá Football Club|Adap Galo Maringá-PR]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 4
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 =
| RD1-score16-2 =
| RD2-team01 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]
| RD2-team02 = [[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze-PB]]
| RD2-score01-1 = 2
| RD2-score02-1 = 0
| RD2-score01-2 =
| RD2-score02-2 =
| RD2-team03 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]
| RD2-team04 = [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu-PA]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 0
| RD2-score04-1 = 1
| RD2-score03-2 = 5
| RD2-score04-2 = 0
| RD2-team05 = [[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]
| RD2-team06 = [[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama-DF]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 2
| RD2-score06-1 = 2
| RD2-score05-2 = 1
| RD2-score06-2 = 2
| RD2-team07 = [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense-SC]]
| RD2-team08 = [[Esporte Clube Noroeste|Noroeste-SP]]
| RD2-score07-1 = 0
| RD2-score08-1 = 0
| RD2-score07-2 = 4
| RD2-score08-2 = 1
| RD3-team01 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]
| RD3-team02 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 2
| RD3-score02-1 = 2 
| RD3-score01-2 = 0
| RD3-score02-2 = 2
| RD3-team03 = [[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama-DF]]
| RD3-team04 = [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense-SC]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 2
| RD3-score04-1 = 4
| RD3-score03-2 = 1
| RD3-score04-2 = 2
| RD4-team01 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]
| RD4-team02 = [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense-SC]]
| RD4-score01 = 
| RD4-score02 = 
}}

{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]
| RD1-team02 = [[Colo-Colo de Futebol e Regatas|Colo-Colo-BA]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 3
| RD1-score02-1 = 1
| RD1-score01-2 =
| RD1-score02-2 =
| RD1-team03 = [[America Football Club (RJ)|América-RJ]]
| RD1-team04 = [[Associação Atlética Coruripe|Coruripe-AL]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 1
| RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 3
| RD1-score04-2 = 1
| RD1-team05 = [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta-SP]]
| RD1-team06 = [[Villa Nova Atlético Clube|Villa Nova-MG]]
| RD1-score05-1 = 0
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 2
| RD1-score06-2 = 3
| RD1-team07 = [[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí-SC]]
| RD1-team08 = [[Rio Branco Sport Club|Rio Branco-PR]]*
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 1
| RD1-score07-2 = 0
| RD1-score08-2 = 1
| RD1-team09 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
| RD1-team10 = [[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA-AL]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 1
| RD1-score09-2 = 5
| RD1-score10-2 = 2
| RD1-team11 = [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará-CE]]
| RD1-team12 = [[Barras Futebol Clube|Barras-PI]]
| RD1-score11-1 = 0
| RD1-score12-1 = 1
| RD1-score11-2 = 2
| RD1-score12-2 = 0
| RD1-team13 = [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba-PR]]
| RD1-team14 = [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias-RS]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 1
| RD1-score14-1 = 2
| RD1-score13-2 = 4
| RD1-score14-2 = 1
| RD1-team15 = [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz-PE]]
| RD1-team16 = [[Sport Club Ulbra Ji-Paraná|Ulbra Ji-Paraná-RO]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 0
| RD1-score16-1 = 2
| RD1-score15-2 = 1
| RD1-score16-2 = 2
| RD2-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]
| RD2-team02 = [[America Football Club (RJ)|América-RJ]]
| RD2-score01-1 = 1
| RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = 2
| RD2-score02-2 = 1
| RD2-team03 = [[Villa Nova Atlético Clube|Villa Nova-MG]]
| RD2-team04 = [[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí-SC]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 0
| RD2-score04-1 = 0
| RD2-score03-2 = 2
| RD2-score04-2 = 3
| RD2-team05 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
| RD2-team06 = [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará-CE]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 0
| RD2-score06-1 = 0
| RD2-score05-2 = 2
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-team07 = [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba-PR]]
| RD2-team08 = [[Sport Club Ulbra Ji-Paraná|Ulbra Ji-Paraná-RO]]
| RD2-score07-1 = 2
| RD2-score08-1 = 2
| RD2-score07-2 = 1
| RD2-score08-2 = 0
| RD3-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]] ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD3-team02 = [[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí-SC]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 2
| RD3-score02-1 = 0 
| RD3-score01-2 = 1
| RD3-score02-2 = 0
| RD3-team03 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
| RD3-team04 = [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba-PR]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 1
| RD3-score04-1 = 0
| RD3-score03-2 = 3
| RD3-score04-2 = 3
| RD4-team01 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]
| RD4-team02 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
| RD4-score01 = 
| RD4-score02 = 
}}

==Final phase==
{{4TeamBracket-2legs
| RD1=Semi-finals
| RD2=Finals

| RD1-team1=[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]
| RD1-score1-1=2
| RD1-score1-2=1
| RD1-score1-A=3
| RD1-team2='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]]'''
| RD1-score2-1=4
| RD1-score2-2=1
| RD1-score2-A=5

| RD1-team3='''[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense-SC]]''' ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-score3-1=2
| RD1-score3-2=1
| RD1-score3-A=3
| RD1-team4=[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
| RD1-score4-1=0
| RD1-score4-2=3
| RD1-score4-A=3

| RD2-team1='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]]'''
| RD2-score1-1=1
| RD2-score1-2=1
| RD2-score1-A=2
| RD2-team2=[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense-SC]]
| RD2-score2-1=1
| RD2-score2-2=0
| RD2-score2-A=1
}}

==Champion==

{| width=95%
|- align=center
|'''Copa do Brasil 2007''':<br><br>[[File:Bandeira do estado do Rio de Janeiro.svg|border|120px|Fluminense FC]]<br>'''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense-RJ]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==External links==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20071224132407/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2007.htm Copa do Brasil 2007 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

[[Category:2007 in Brazilian football|Copa Do Brasil, 2007]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2007]]
[[Category:2007 in domestic association football cups|Copa Do Brasil, 2007]]
